name: asm-agent
description: An Apple Silicon assembly CLI that talks to an AI helper.

scripts.check: npm run build --silent && ./bin/asm-agent --help >/dev/null && ASM_AGENT_STATE=/tmp/asm-agent-check-memory.txt ASM_AGENT_MOCK_RESPONSE='offline helper ok' ./bin/asm-agent test && ASM_AGENT_STATE=/tmp/asm-agent-check-memory.txt ./bin/asm-agent history >/dev/null
